Client with like a really large content catalog, like we've got, I've got another one that's got thousands of pages on their blog and their website and everything.
And so like, they do go after some of that, because it's just, it's just expanding their internet presence, you know, but individually, they're not getting a ton of traffic on any one thing.
Whereas like, we, you, you and I come up with like this really great idea that's really relevant.
And it gets a bunch of, it gets some good, comparatively, a lot of clicks from things you've done before, and it makes a big impact.
So it's a, it's just a different challenge.

And I kind of have a little more fun actually working on your code content, because it's more at that granular level, as opposed to just more, more, more, you know, it feels like it feels like we're impacting things a little bit more.

But yeah, there's definitely like, you know, they're looking for ways to like, you know, really direct head to head competition kind of stuff is where it gets to when you've got that kind of volume, you know, you're really just trying to come up every time.
having an increased competitor become...

A thing, like, a unit department that, like, competitor intelligence, we have to follow the competitors very closely.

Well, and also, you know, one of my other clients is, like, very tech-focused, too.
So that's another reason that, like, GE is, A, more important to them, but also that they've got, like, it's, and by more important, I mean, like, attached to their core product, right?
And then also that people that are their ICP use AI, so they're more aware, and so they want to be there.

And so their challenge is really not so much making sure they're there at all, because they are, but making sure that they're appearing more often in their competition, and that the things being said are correct and good, and, you know, all that stuff.

Yeah, I'm going to share that with our experiment, like, we've a team that does, like, experimental kind of stuff, and there's been a lot of talk about whether or not that's super effective or not, and so it'll be interesting, like, that'll be a good, a good use case for them to kind of track, too, to see if it does, what it, what, you know, how much impact it has on, on Geo.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Legal Content Paused:** All legal/compliance articles are paused. The topic, especially SMS laws, is a major sales roadblock, prompting prospects to involve legal teams and often leading to lost deals.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [**Record Clicks & Traffic:** Last week set a new record for clicks (+34% WoW, \>2x since start), with traffic growth directly mirroring content focus (e.g., Open Enrollment, Scheduling).](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [**Content Consolidation Approved:** A plan to merge articles into pillar content was approved to improve SEO authority and reduce internal competition.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [**Frontline Intelligence Strategy:** New content will focus on HR pain points (e.g., analyzing employee sentiment), not generic tech terms, to better match user search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Strategy

  - [**Record Performance:** Last week set a new record for clicks (+34% WoW, \>2x since start).](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [**Traffic Mirrors Focus:** Growth aligns with content efforts in key clusters:](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
      - [Open Enrollment](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [Scheduling & Call-offs](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
      - [Templates](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [**Top Performers:** The "Cost of Translation" and "Surveys" articles remain consistent traffic drivers.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [**GEO Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
      - [**Citations:** Mentions in LLMs have more than doubled since July.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
      - [**GA4 Data:** Shows 145 sessions from ChatGPT, confirming direct traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Scrunch Insights:** The dashboard reveals highly relevant user prompts (e.g., "secure document sharing methods"), providing a strong source for new topics.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [**Indexing Issue:** The Chinese checklist URL failed to index. The Tagalog checklist fix (manual submission) will be replicated.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)

### Content Consolidation & Enrichment

  - [**Goal:** Merge articles into pillar content to improve SEO authority and reduce internal competition.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [**Survey Results:** Merge 4 articles → 1 pillar: "How to take action on employee survey results."](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Consolidates related content; the "Examples of employee survey feedback" article will remain separate due to its distinct keyword focus.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [**Survey Distribution:** Merge 5 articles → 1 pillar: "How can you distribute a questionnaire?"](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Broaden scope beyond just distribution to cover best practices and response rates.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
  - [**Employee Communication:** Merge 3 articles → 1 pillar.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Differentiate from the Resources page by adding technical depth (e.g., Yourco's multi-HRIS integration).](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [**Enrichment Prioritization:**](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
    1.  [Articles with the most clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
    2.  [Articles with the oldest "last updated" date.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
  - [**Dated Content:** Articles with specific years (e.g., "Overtime Rules 2025") will not be updated unless laws change.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Users prefer official sources for legal info, and these articles often become zero-click searches.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Focus on practical tips (e.g., "How to communicate new overtime rules") to provide unique value.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

### Frontline Intelligence Content Strategy

  - [**Angle:** Focus on HR pain points and insights, not generic tech terms.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [**Keywords:** Target HR-specific terms like "employee sentiment," "turnover rate," and "predictive HR analytics."](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [**Content Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [How to identify and analyze key HR metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [How to download and analyze survey reports.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [**Enrichment Mandate:** Integrate Frontline Intelligence insights into all relevant article updates.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1973.0)
      - [Archive all legal/compliance articles.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
      - [Replicate the Tagalog checklist indexing fix for the Chinese checklist URL.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [Request Scrunch dashboard access from Kyle for Jessica.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
      - [Begin drafting Frontline Intelligence articles with the new HR-focused angle.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)
      - [Execute the content consolidation plan, prioritizing by clicks and last-updated date.](https://fathom.video/share/juGJCWNnWYpGxXaCkFPQSVvf9Ux7xUzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)

action_items.description: Archive legal articles; remove from content board
Email Jessica performance charts (clicks, top articles, clusters)
Email Kyle re: Scrunch admin; request export/assets; then share w/ Jessica
Resubmit Chinese checklist to Google Search Console; monitor indexing
Review URLs for spammy terms; adjust as needed
Draft FI topics using HR terms; share w/ Jessica
Merge survey articles; keep canonical; 301s; add FAQs
Merge survey distribution articles; keep canonical; 301s; add FAQs
Merge employee comms articles; keep canonical; 301s; add FAQs; enrich w/ HRIS
Prioritize enrichment by last-updated + clicks; integrate FI insights
Share LMS file experiment details w/ internal team
